title: Star Wars: Sith Lightsabers pack
description: The resource pack for version 1.20.1+ replaces the default lightsabers with Sith lightsabers from Star Wars.
body: **The resource pack for version 1.20.1+ replaces the default lightsabers with Sith lightsabers from Star Wars** 1. Maul's lightsaber from the animated series Rebels. 2. Darth Malgus's lightsaber. 3. Darth Malak's lightsaber. 4. The Inquisitor's lightsaber. 5. Kylo Ren's lightsaber.﻿
